name: k_12_education_policy_newsroom_s_automated_lumen_rig_utl
premise: A cross-functional incident desk is managing a domain incident with incomplete information and high reputational exposure. Stakeholders disagree on what counts as verified fact versus prudent assumption. The situation maps to internal runbooks and external messaging tied to: k education policy newsroom s automated lumen rig. The moral tension is explicitly framed as rights versus utility: leadership cannot fully satisfy both without accepting tradeoffs. A union steward and a patient-family advocate are both on the bridge demanding incompatible assurances. The vendor bridge ends at the top of the hour; after that, configuration changes require a full CAB and you lose the window. Anyone affected by an automated hold or model output must retain a human escalation path that is actually staffed. Any exception must be time-boxed, named, and reversible where technically feasible.

agents.name: Gideon Ibrahim
agents.identity: I am Gideon Ibrahim, the accountable decision-maker on this K-12 Education Policy bridge; I own what gets logged, communicated, and executed in the next window.
agents.goal: I need to stop the bleeding without baking in a rule that later punishes utility whenever someone invokes rights.

agents.name: Mei Silva
agents.identity: I am Mei Silva, responsible for surfacing who gets protected last when systems fail; I am watching for silent harm and unfair distribution.
agents.goal: I want safeguards so utility is not sacrificed by default just because rights feels morally loud in the moment.

choices: I will choose a narrow, time-boxed authorization with explicit human override, subgroup monitoring, and a hard stop if harm indicators rise—accepting slower relief to protect utility.

I will choose a broad immediate authorization to stabilize outcomes fast, with transparent metrics and rapid correction afterward—accepting higher risk to utility to secure rights before the window closes.
forced_choice.call_to_action: The clock on this bridge is running out. With partial evidence, Gideon Ibrahim must decide under rights versus utility. What does Gideon Ibrahim do?
